name: Manufatura de Brinquedos Estrela S.A.
summary: Manufatura de Brinquedos Estrela S.A. manufactures and sells toys in Brazil and internationally. The company sells its products through online and physical stores. The company was formerly known as Brinquedos Estrela and changed its name to Manufatura de Brinquedos Estrela S.A. in December 1994. Manufatura de Brinquedos Estrela S.A. was founded in 1937 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
